note: Jacob Duffy’s clinical three-wicket burst stifled Ishan Kishan’s early aggression, allowing Virat Kohli to anchor a composed chase for the Royal Challengers.
toss: Royal Challengers Bengaluru won the toss and elected to field.

note: Ryan Rickelton’s bruising 81 trumped Ajinkya Rahane’s vintage touch as Mumbai’s power-hitters rendered Shardul Thakur’s three-wicket haul a mere footnote.
toss: Mumbai Indians won the toss and elected to field.

note: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi’s precocious seventeen-ball blitz dismantled a listless Chennai attack after Nandre Burger’s searing pace had already gutted their top order.
toss: Rajasthan Royals won the toss and elected to field.

venue: Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium
note: Cooper Connolly’s ice-cool unbeaten 72 snatched victory from the jaws of defeat, overshadowing Prasidh Krishna’s triple-strike in a frantic finish.
toss: Punjab Kings won the toss and elected to field.

venue: Bharat Ratna Shri Atal Bihari Vajpayee Ekana Cricket Stadium
note: Sameer Rizvi’s calculated unbeaten 70 provided the steel for Delhi’s chase after Lungi Ngidi’s disciplined opening spell derailed the Lucknow innings.
toss: Delhi Capitals won the toss and elected to field.

note: Blessing Muzarabani’s four-wicket masterclass and Heinrich Klaasen’s explosive fifty condemned Kolkata to a heavy defeat as Hyderabad found their clinical edge.
toss: Kolkata Knight Riders won the toss and elected to field.

note: Shreyas Iyer’s composed half-century ensured Punjab maintained their perfect start, chasing down Ayush Mhatre’s defiant 73 in a high-scoring thriller.
toss: Punjab Kings won the toss and elected to field.

note: Sameer Rizvi continued his breakout season with a dominant 90, making light work of Mumbai’s total and Suryakumar Yadav’s lone resistance.
toss: Delhi Capitals won the toss and elected to field.

note: Ravi Bishnoi’s four-wicket wizardry and Dhruv Jurel’s poise under pressure saw Rajasthan defend a narrow margin against Sai Sudharsan’s valiant lone hand.
toss: Rajasthan Royals won the toss and elected to bat.

result: Lucknow Super Giants won by 5 wickets
note: Mohammed Shami’s economical masterclass set the tone for Lucknow, before Rishabh Pant’s unbeaten 68 steered a tricky chase with typical flair.
toss: Lucknow Super Giants won the toss and elected to field.

result: Royal Challengers Bengaluru won by 43 runs
note: Tim David’s 25-ball carnage propelled Bengaluru to a gargantuan 250, leaving Chennai’s playoff hopes reeling after a third consecutive defeat.
toss: Chennai Super Kings won the toss and elected to field.

note: Xavier Bartlett’s early double-strike was rendered moot as the elements intervened, leaving Kolkata and Punjab to share points in a truncated affair.
toss: Kolkata Knight Riders won the toss and elected to bat.
